entry.title: 人工智能时代
entry.content: 5min内看书未遂 《人工智能时代》 （1）节选： 中国社会鼓励人们努力工作、勇于创新和冒险，虽然这种价值取向能够让贫富差距变得合乎情理。 （2） 细碎念 完全看不下去，没有任何阅读的momentum. 读一本书，首先自己要认识清楚自己。我是一介平民，还是生来便注定载入史册？我是想平凡人生，以人文情怀体会快乐，还是自认为可以独步世界，从几亿人中脱颖而出，指导全人类未来？ 很喜欢以前老师曾说的一句话：你不是班长。我是谁？我要活成什么样子？我是不是我自己？何必感叹前人的伟大、科技的力量、世界的奇妙。人生短暂，生来决定了你的界限。你可以尽情看着世界大佬侃侃而谈，自己不知所云，稀里糊涂。你可以对世界的专家顶礼膜拜，吹捧夸赞。而我只想说那一句被人遗忘的话：人生而平等，人生不平等。 人生而平等。你是人，我是人，何必因为评判准则下的所谓的伟人 而妄自菲薄，否定自我？何必又因评判准则而自以为是，狂妄自大？你只是人罢了。换言之：你不是神仙。人生不平等。人是人，人分无数种。无数的人构成戏剧，构成美梦的匹诺康尼。可笑可笑。历史会推动一切。 Failed to read within 5 minutes The Age of Artificial intelligence(1) Excerpt: Chinese society encourages people to work hard, be creative and take risks, even though such values can justify the wealth gap. (2) comments Can’t read totally. Don’t have any momentum to continue reading. To read a book, you must first know yourself. Am i a commoner, or was i born to go down in history? Do I want to live an ordinary life and experience happiness with humanistic feelings, or do I think I can walk alone in the world, stand out from hundreds of millions of people, and guide the future of all mankind? Like the previous teacher has said a sentence: you are not the monitor. Who am I? What am I supposed to be? Am I myself? Why lament the greatness of our predecessors, the power of science and technology, and the wonder of the world? Life is short, born to determine your boundaries. You can watch the world’s biggest men talk, and you can’t make sense of it. You can worship and praise the world’s experts. And I just want to say the forgotten words: All men are created equal, all men are not equal. All men are created equal. You are a human being, I am a human being, why should you belittle yourself and deny yourself because of the so-called great people under the criteria of judgment? Why be arrogant and arrogant because of the criteria? You’re just human. In other words: You’re not a fairy. Life is not equal. People are people, there are countless kinds of people. Countless people make up the drama, the Pinoconi of dreams. It’s ridiculous. History will drive everything.
